title: Matatu to Naivasha

title: Lake morning
details: Boat or shore walk at Lake Naivasha. Matatu back to Nairobi by afternoon.

title: Naivasha

details: Menengai crater viewpoint. Bus back to Nairobi.

title: Diani beach
details: Public beach, street food, optional snorkel hire.

details: Matatu to SGR terminus; afternoon train to Nairobi.

title: Dawn game drive
details: Join 6am shared van. Rhino, lion, giraffe with city skyline. Back by lunch.

details: Night or day bus. Lakeside guesthouse sunset.

details: Morning boat, bus back to Nairobi.

details: Bus to Mokowe, dhow to old town guesthouse.

title: Old town lanes
details: Fort, markets, rooftop sunset.

title: Shela beach
details: Dhow to Shela dunes and swim.

title: Dhow day
details: Mangrove channel or sandbank picnic.

title: Return coast
details: Boat and bus back.

title: To Sirimon
details: Bus to Nanyuki, gate registration, Old Moses camp.

title: Acclimatize
details: Short hike to moorland. Sleep Shipton camp.

title: Exit
details: Trek to gate, matatu to Nairobi.

details: Jetty boat to reef. Gede ruins stop.

title: Return

details: Morning train. Afternoon taxi safari loop Aruba Dam.

details: Dawn drive exit. Bus or SGR on to Mombasa.

details: Day bus. Guesthouse check-in.

title: Elementaita
details: Community camp flamingo sunset.

details: Hostel check-in, beach afternoon.

title: Reef morning
details: Optional snorkel. Evening tuk-tuk food crawl.

details: B&B check-in. Karura waterfall loop.

details: Morning ridge hike. Brunch return to city.

details: Bus via Eldoret. Guesthouse on escarpment.

details: Viewpoints and optional Koromosho guided hike.

title: Return
details: Morning run viewpoint. Bus to Nairobi.

details: Shared taxi from Kiserian. Hot spring soak and pink shoreline photos.

title: Walking safari
details: Crescent Island boat and walk. Camp Oloiden.

title: Shore morning
details: Birding and hippo lookout. Matatu home.
